uplink.description: MICA sensor message — numeric mould/noise readings
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds MICA frame. Channel values cross-checked by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle): temperature 21.3 C, humidity 45.5 %, co2 612 ppm, tvoc 120, pm2_5 8, pm10 12, indices 60/70/55/82, mould 3, noise 48 dB, counter 42. Big-endian uint16 fields; type string "MICA" at offsets 27..30.

uplink.description: MICA sensor message — sensor-warming-up sentinels (mould Calculating, noise Preheating)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds MICA frame exercising the 0xff sentinels. Cross-checked by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle): temperature 18.5 C, humidity 62.3 %, co2 1024 ppm, tvoc 350, pm2_5 25, pm10 40, indices 45/88/30/65; mould byte 0xff -> "Calculating"; noise byte 0xff -> "Preheating"; counter 7.

uplink.description: Configuration message (type 0) is not a measurement
uplink._note: TTN upstream example input for the device configuration frame (message-type byte 0). Our normalized codec only emits measurements, so a non-sensor frame is reported as an error rather than normalized.
